Hero.title: Every Scrap Store. Just One Website.
Hero.hero_desc: Create your own spare parts store online , no physical shop needed.

Features.title: Features
Features.search_desc: you can search all Scraps Stores in Thai even large store, small store , New parts Store or Used parts Store.
Features.store_desc: You can create your own store without physical store. Create a personalized store that your needs.
Features.delivery_desc: you can choose to pick up directly from store with yourself or have delivered to your doorstep.
Features.chat_desc: you can chat with the store owner to ask questions or get more information about the products.
